docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY MONTERO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, RONY DE ORELLANA, DINORA PATRICIA GARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANTHONY MONTERO. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT TONY RIVERA. NO APPEARANCE FOR DINORA GARCIA DE ORELLANA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
